latest_session.goal: AI infrastructure maintenance — fix helpi crash in Gemini, design and implement grill-paper/grill-edit skills, migrate session skills to shared ~/.agents/skills/, audit and harden platform error-correction log propagation to all agents.
latest_session.outcome: All three agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini) now share session-management skills via ~/.agents/skills/, see platform facts and known_issues.md proactively in every context, have the complete helpi 1-24 table, and have access to grill-paper/grill-edit for pre-submission paper quality checks.
latest_session.next_steps: Run helpi 7 AI_auto to regenerate handover after this close Consider installing remaining Matt Pocock skills in Codex/Gemini if useful Mistral Vibe CLI integration deferred until shared skills are stable
